sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Invitation Homes Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Shares of Invitation Homes Inc. (INVH) rose 2.32% to $27.30 on Thursday, outperforming the broader market which saw declines in the S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average. This gain ended a two-day losing streak for the stock.

feed.title: Magnite Taps AMC And Hearst To Deepen Connected TV And Video Reach
feed.summary: Magnite has formed new partnerships with AMC Global Media and Hearst News to expand its presence in programmatic TV and video advertising. These collaborations aim to enhance access to premium TV and news inventory for advertisers, leveraging Magnite's ClearLine and Live Scheduler tools for integrated programmatic campaigns across linear and streaming platforms. This move is expected to strengthen Magnite's position in the connected TV market and appeal to advertisers seeking brand-safe, high-attention inventory.

feed.title: ONEOK Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $1.07 a Share, Payable May 15 to Holders of Record May 4
feed.summary: ONEOK has announced that it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $1.07 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on May 15 to shareholders of record as of May 4. This decision reflects the company's consistent return of value to its investors.

feed.title: Eaton Shareholders Approve Directors, Pay and Capital Authorities
feed.summary: At Eaton's Annual General Meeting on April 22, 2026, shareholders re-elected all 11 directors and approved the executive compensation program. They also ratified Ernst & Young as the 2026 auditor and granted the board authority for share issuance and buybacks under Irish law, providing capital management flexibility. Analysts have a "Buy" rating on ETN stock with a $428.00 price target, and TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates ETN as Outperform due to strong financial performance and positive 2026 outlook.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper results lifted by demand for cold beverages
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper's first-quarter results surpassed expectations, driven by strong sales of cold beverages and energy drinks. The company reported revenue of $3.98 billion and is proceeding with its strategic plan to split into two separate entities: a beverage company and a coffee company, with the official split expected in early 2027. Despite market skepticism regarding debt, cold drink revenue grew by 12%, offsetting a drop in US coffee revenue, and the company reaffirmed its full-year outlook.

feed.title: MaxLinear (MXL) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
feed.summary: MaxLinear reported a strong Q1 2026, with revenue up 43% year-over-year, primarily driven by its optical data center business. The company raised its full-year optical data center revenue expectations to $150 million-$170 million, citing significant momentum from hyperscaler ramps and increased visibility. MaxLinear anticipates continued sequential growth across all four of its business segments in Q2, transforming into an infrastructure-focused company positioned for sustained growth.

feed.title: S&P Dow Jones Indices Announces Dow Jones Best-in-Class Indices 2026 Review Results
feed.summary: S&P Dow Jones Indices (S&P DJI) has announced the results of the annual rebalancing and reconstitution for its Dow Jones Best-in-Class Indices (DJ BIC), effective May 1, 2026. This year's review saw Enbridge Inc, Tokio Marine Holdings Inc, and London Stock Exchange Plc added to the DJ BIC World, while Microsoft Corp, Siemens AG, and Union Pacific Corp were deleted. The DJ BIC, formerly Dow Jones Sustainability Indices (DJSI), tracks equity markets with a sustainability best-in-class selection process and updated its rebalancing schedule to align with the S&P Global Corporate Sustainability Assessment.

feed.title: Jabil Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.08 a Share, Payable June 2 to Holders of Record May 15
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. (JBL) announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.08 per share. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on June 2, 2026, to shareholders who are on record as of May 15, 2026. The information was published by MT Newswires on April 23, 2026.

feed.title: Grabar Law Office Investigates Claims on Behalf of LKQ Corporation (LKQ) Shareholders
feed.summary: Grabar Law Office is investigating potential claims against LKQ Corporation (NASDAQ: LKQ) concerning alleged breaches of fiduciary duty related to its $2.1 billion acquisition of Uni-Select, including the FinishMaster business. The investigation stems from a federal securities class action claiming LKQ senior executives misled investors about FinishMaster's performance and risks, particularly its customer losses and inability to maintain market share. Shareholders who purchased LKQ shares before February 27, 2023, are encouraged to contact Grabar Law Office for potential corporate reforms and fund recovery, while those who bought shares between February 27, 2023, and July 23, 2025, can participate in the class action.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.02 a Share, Payable June 4 to Holders of Record May 14
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand Inc. announced that it will keep its quarterly dividend at $0.02 per share. This dividend is payable on June 4, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 14, 2026. The article also provides recent analyst ratings and insider transaction news for the company.

feed.title: Salesforce (NYSE: CRM) CEO covers RSU tax bill with 22,560 shares
feed.summary: Salesforce's Chair and CEO, Marc Benioff, reported a routine tax-related disposition where 22,560 shares of common stock were withheld to cover his tax liability from a performance-based restricted stock unit award. The shares were withheld at $189.80 each, totaling $4.28 million. After this event, Benioff continues to hold a substantial ownership stake, with 11,934,486 direct shares and additional indirect holdings through the Marc Benioff Fund LLC and a trust.

feed.title: Confirmed: Boeing 777X To Enter Service In 2027 After 7-Year & $15 Billion Delay
feed.summary: Boeing has confirmed that its 777-9 aircraft is on track for its first delivery in 2027, seven years later than its original target and after incurring $15 billion in charges. This confirmation comes as the program makes progress in certification, with Lufthansa set to be the launch customer. Despite the positive update, the aircraft faces challenges including the need to sell roughly 300 units to recover development costs and potential rework required for early-build aircraft.

feed.title: Medpace Holdings Inc (MEDP) Shares Fall 22.7% -- What GF Score of 99 Tells Investors
feed.summary: Medpace Holdings Inc (MEDP) shares experienced a significant 22.7% drop, leading to a 29.9% year-to-date decline, despite the stock being deemed 17.0% undervalued by GF Value™. The company holds a high GF Score™ of 99/100, indicating strong profitability and growth, yet faces concerns due to $14.4 million in insider selling with no buying activity over the last three months, prompting caution for investors.

feed.title: Gen Digital Inc (GEN) Shares Fall 5.9% -- What GF Score of 84 Te
feed.summary: Gen Digital Inc (GEN) shares recently dropped 5.9%, with the stock down significantly year-to-date and over the past year. Despite a GF Score™ of 84/100 indicating strong potential for long-term returns and an assessment that the stock is undervalued, there are concerns regarding its financial strength and insider selling. Investors are cautioned about a "Possible Value Trap," suggesting underlying issues despite the apparent discount.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies Inc (TYL) Shares Fall 3.1% -- What GF Score o
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies Inc (TYL) shares fell 3.1% to $335.74, representing a 41.0% decline over the past year. Despite this, GuruFocus's GF Value™ suggests the stock is significantly undervalued by 37.5%, with an intrinsic value of $536.78, and a strong GF Score™ of 86/100, driven by high financial strength, profitability, and growth. However, recent insider selling and price volatility indicate potential risks and challenges that investors should consider.

feed.title: McDonald's (MCD) USA president sells 333 shares in open-market trade
feed.summary: Joseph M. Erlinger, President of McDonald's USA, sold 333 shares of McDonald's common stock in an open-market transaction at $302.72 per share. Following this sale, Erlinger directly holds 8,066.89 shares of the company. This insider trading activity was disclosed via a Form 4 filing.

feed.title: TransUnion Applauds FHFA, HUD for Advancing VantageScore in Mortgage Lending
feed.summary: TransUnion applauds the FHFA and HUD for moving forward with the inclusion of VantageScore 4.0 in the U.S. mortgage market, aiming to expand access to affordable homeownership. The company emphasizes its commitment to driving a smooth transition, offering competitive pricing, multi-year pricing forecasts, and a free credit score simulator. TransUnion highlights that VantageScore 4.0, powered by its trended credit data, will enhance predictive power and provide a more comprehensive view of borrower credit performance.

feed.title: AIG Unit Denies Coverage For $5.4M Casino Sprinkler Repair
feed.summary: An AIG unit informed a California federal court that it is not obligated to cover a $5.4 million award against a subcontractor. The award was for the repair and replacement of an allegedly faulty sprinkler system in a Las Vegas hotel. The AIG unit argued that defective work does not fall under covered property damage.

feed.title: Is Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) Pricing In Too Much Optimism After Recent Share Price Swings
feed.summary: This article analyzes Chipotle Mexican Grill's (CMG) valuation using Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) and Price/Earnings (P/E) ratios. The DCF analysis suggests the stock is overvalued by 24.8% at $28.12 per share compared to its current price of $35. The P/E ratio of 29.78x is above the industry average but below peers, and insights from various community narratives frame potential bull and bear case fair values.

feed.title: Paycom Software Gets $2.125 Billion Credit Facility From JPMorgan
feed.summary: Paycom Software has secured a new $2.125 billion revolving credit facility from JPMorgan Chase, replacing its previous agreement. This facility, maturing in 2031, includes an option for an additional $750 million. The company plans to use the funds for general corporate purposes, including working capital, permitted acquisitions, and share repurchases; approximately $675 million was outstanding at the time of the announcement.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.1875 per Share, Payable June 4 to Holders of Record May 14
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines (DAL) has announced that it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.1875 per share. The dividend is payable on June 4 to shareholders of record as of May 14. This decision was published on MarketScreener, indicating the company's consistent return of capital to its investors.

feed.title: VeriSign (VRSN) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
feed.summary: VeriSign reported strong Q1 2026 results, reaching a record high in .com and .net domain names due to strong new registrations and improved renewal rates. The company raised its 2026 revenue and domain growth guidance and announced a $0.71 increase in the .com wholesale price, effective November 1, 2026. Management also discussed its continued commitment to 100% service availability and its cautious evaluation of participating in ICANN's new gTLD application round.

feed.title: Vail Resorts Visits, Revenue, and Pass Sales Down
feed.summary: Vail Resorts reported significant declines in skier visits, revenue, and early season pass sales for the North American ski season through April 19, 2026. CEO Rob Katz attributed these downturns to "one of the most challenging winters in history across the western U.S.," marked by record low snowfall and warm temperatures, particularly affecting the Rockies. Further details are expected in the company's third-quarter report in June 2026.

feed.title: Parker Hannifin raises quarterly dividend 11% to $2.00 per share By Investing.com
feed.summary: Parker Hannifin Corporation announced an 11% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $2.00 per share, marking the 304th consecutive quarterly dividend. The company boasts a 70-year streak of annual dividend increases, placing it among the S&P 500's top dividend-growth records. This decision reflects the Board's confidence in Parker Hannifin's consistent cash flow and long-term outlook, alongside recent strong financial results including exceeding Q2 2026 earnings and revenue forecasts.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin raises quarterly dividend by 11.1% to $2.00/share
feed.summary: Parker-Hannifin (PH) has announced an 11.1% increase in its quarterly cash dividend, raising it from $1.80 per share to $2.00 per share. This dividend is payable on March 1, 2024, to shareholders of record as of February 9, 2024. The company maintains a long history of consistent dividend payments.

feed.title: First Western Financial : Q1 Earnings 2026 Presentation
feed.summary: First Western Financial reported strong first-quarter 2026 earnings, with diluted EPS up 85% from the prior quarter and 47% year-over-year. The company saw positive trends including increased net income, solid loan and deposit growth, improved net interest margin, and enhanced asset quality. These results reflect continued execution on strategic priorities and disciplined expense management, positioning the company for further financial performance improvements.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs : Announces Redemption of All Outstanding Depositary Shares Representing Interests in Its 3.80% Fixed-Rate Reset Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock, Series T
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. announced its intention to redeem all outstanding depositary shares representing interests in its 3.80% Fixed-Rate Reset Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock, Series T, on May 10, 2026. The redemption price will be $1,000 per depositary share, plus any declared and unpaid dividends. Dividends on the Series T Preferred Stock will cease to accrue after the redemption date.

feed.title: Generac power systems is recalling generators for a fire risk
feed.summary: Generac Power Systems has recalled certain orange and black generators due to a fire risk. The company is offering free repairs for the affected units. This recall aims to address the safety hazard and ensure the generators are safe for use.

feed.title: Federal Scrutiny Of Duke Energy Dams Reframes Long Term Risk Story
feed.summary: Federal regulators are increasing oversight of Duke Energy's hydroelectric facilities, particularly the Nantahala and Jocassee projects, requiring more rigorous engineering and risk assessments. This increased scrutiny, while not immediately questioning current safety, adds complexity to project planning and could impact capital allocation and timelines for Duke Energy (NYSE: DUK). Investors should monitor Duke's responses to these new requirements and any potential effects on construction schedules, budgets, or operating parameters, as these regulatory actions reframe the company's long-term risk profile.

feed.title: Executive pay and board votes at Caesars (NASDAQ: CZR) 2026 meeting
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment, Inc. (NASDAQ: CZR) announced details for its June 9, 2026, annual meeting, where shareholders will vote on the election of 11 directors, an advisory approval of named executive officer compensation, and the ratification of Deloitte & Touche LLP as the independent auditor. The proxy statement details a performance-based executive pay program, with 2025 results showing $11.5 billion in net revenues but a $437 million net loss. Due to shareholder feedback, the company has modified its long-term incentive program to reduce overlapping performance metrics.

feed.title: Did Las Vegas Sands' (LVS) Q1 Beat and Completed Buyback Reshape Its Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: Las Vegas Sands (LVS) reported strong Q1 2026 results with revenue of US$3.59 billion and net income of US$567 million, driven by their Marina Bay Sands and Macao operations. The company also completed a significant share repurchase program, buying back over 143 million shares for US$7.28 billion. This performance reinforces LVS's investment narrative focused on strong cash generation from its concentrated Asian market exposure and ongoing capital returns.

feed.title: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) Shares Up 3.1% - What's Next?
feed.summary: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) shares rose 3.1% on Thursday, trading around $67.17. Analysts have a mixed view, with a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of $65.88, though some firms increased their targets. The company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $1.06, resulting in a 6.3% yield, but reported a slight miss on EPS and a 0.5% decrease in revenue year-over-year in its latest quarter.

feed.title: Is Weyerhaeuser (WY) Priced Fairly After Mixed Returns And Conflicting Valuation Signals?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Weyerhaeuser (WY) stock valuation using two methods: Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio. The DCF model suggests the stock is significantly undervalued by 80.0%, with an estimated intrinsic value of US$123.79 compared to its current price of US$24.77. However, the P/E ratio of 55.1x indicates it is overvalued when compared to the Specialized REITs industry average of 16.4x and Simply Wall St's proprietary "Fair Ratio" of 43.8x.

feed.title: Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) Shares Down 1.6% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) shares declined 1.6% intraday, trading around $133.95, following a pullback from recent highs and a negative analyst report from Barclays, which initiated coverage with an Underweight rating and a $130 price target due to handset weakness. Despite beating quarterly earnings estimates and announcing a $20 billion share repurchase program and a raised dividend, analysts expect a decline in earnings for the current fiscal year, increasing downside risk. Institutional investors made significant changes to their positions, while company insiders sold shares totaling over $1.2 million in the last 90 days.

feed.title: Earnings at Mach
feed.summary: Mach Natural Resources LP is scheduled to report its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, May 7, 2026, after the close of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The Oklahoma City-based energy company finished 2025 with significant gains in cash distribution and strong production rates. Mach also plans to invest between $315 million and $360 million in total capital development in 2026.

feed.title: Caterpillar Inc (CAT) Stock Up 3.3% but GF Value Says Overvalued -- GF Score: 84/100
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc (CAT) saw its shares rise 3.3% to $835.24, yet GuruFocus's GF Value™ indicates the stock is significantly overvalued by 117.7% compared to its intrinsic value of $383.64. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 84/100, driven by high profitability and growth, the valuation score is very low (1/10), and insiders have sold $99.5 million worth of shares, suggesting caution for potential investors.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin Raises Quarterly Dividend 11% to $2.00 per Share, Payable June 5 to Holders of Record May 8
feed.summary: Parker-Hannifin Corporation announced an 11% increase in its quarterly dividend, raising it to $2.00 per share. This dividend will be payable on June 5, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 8, 2026. This move indicates the company's confidence in its financial performance and commitment to returning value to its shareholders.

feed.title: AMG Schedules Conference Call to Discuss Q1 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: AMG (NYSE: AMG) will release its Q1 2026 financial results on May 1, 2026, followed by a conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET. President and CEO Jay C. Horgen and CFO Dava E. Ritchea will host the call to discuss quarterly results and future outlook. The article also provides details on recent insider trading, revenue figures, hedge fund activity, and analyst ratings for AMG.

feed.title: Intel Corporation 2026 Q1 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation (NASDAQ:INTC) 2026-04-23
feed.summary: This article provides the earnings call presentation slideshow published by Intel Corporation (NASDAQ:INTC) for their 2026 Q1 results. The presentation was released in conjunction with their earnings call on April 23, 2026. SA Transcripts, a team focused on publishing quarterly earnings calls, wrote the article.

feed.title: HTGC Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Hercules Capital, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm reminds purchasers of Hercules Capital, Inc. (NYSE: HTGC) securities between May 1, 2025, and February 27, 2026, of the May 19, 2026 lead plaintiff deadline for a securities fraud lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Hercules Capital made false and misleading statements regarding its due diligence, portfolio valuation, and classification of investments, leading to overstated valuations and investor damages. Investors who bought HTGC securities during this period may be entitled to compensation.

feed.title: Jabil declares $0.08 dividend
feed.summary: Jabil (NYSE: JBL) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.08 per share. This dividend is payable on June 3, 2024, to shareholders of record as of May 17, 2024. The ex-dividend date for this payment is May 16, 2024.

feed.title: Ingersoll-Rand declares $0.02 dividend
feed.summary: Ingersoll-Rand (NYSE: IR) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.02 per share. The dividend is payable on June 13, 2024, to shareholders of record as of May 1, 2024.

feed.title: [ARS] NextDecade Corp SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by NextDecade Corp (NEXT) on April 23, 2026, at 05:18 PM. The filing is available as a PDF document directly from SEC EDGAR. The article also provides a brief overview of NextDecade's stock performance rankings, market cap, and recent news and SEC filings.

feed.title: Memphis' largest company searches for third CFO since 2020
feed.summary: FedEx, Memphis' largest company, is initiating an internal and external search for its next chief financial officer, marking the third CFO search since 2020. This comes as John Dietrich departs the position. The company has recently been involved in other significant business activities, including a branding deal for FedEx Freight and job cuts.

feed.title: A Look at CSX Corp (CSX) After 7.0% Gain -- GF Value $34.75 vs Price $46.18
feed.summary: CSX Corp (CSX) shares increased by 7.0%, bringing its year-to-date gain to 27.8%. Despite strong momentum, the stock is considered significantly overvalued by GuruFocus, trading at a 32.9% premium to its GF Value estimate of $34.75. Insider selling also outweighs buying, suggesting potential caution from those closest to the company.

feed.title: Cadence Design Systems Inc (CDNS) Stock Down 5.2% -- Now Underva
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems Inc (CDNS) shares dropped 5.2% and are currently priced at $314.33, which is 13.4% below its GF Value™ of $362.90, indicating undervaluation. The company boasts a strong GF Score™ of 99/100, driven by excellent profitability, growth, and valuation ratings. However, insider selling totaling $7.6 million over the last three months raises concerns despite the overall positive financial metrics.

feed.title: Executive pay, plan share increase on ballot at NextDecade (NEXT) 2026 meeting
feed.summary: NextDecade Corporation will hold a virtual annual shareholder meeting on June 3, 2026, where stockholders will vote on electing directors, increasing shares under the 2017 Omnibus Incentive Plan, an advisory vote on executive compensation, and ratifying KPMG LLP as the auditor. The company reported significant progress at its Rio Grande LNG facility, with Phase 1 construction 58% complete and positive final investment decisions for Trains 4 and 5. Executive bonuses for 2025 were based on a scorecard and paid at 157% of target, reflecting achievements in construction, financing, and regulatory milestones.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs (PD) joint 13G: 4.32M shares, 5.1% stake reported
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. and Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC have jointly filed a Schedule 13G, reporting a 5.1% passive stake in PagerDuty, Inc. (PD), representing 4,320,425.17 shares. The filing details shared voting and dispositive power, attributing holdings to Goldman Sachs reporting units and disclaiming ownership of client and managed-entity interests. This disclosure is a standard regulatory filing for significant, passive investment in a public company.

feed.title: Datadog (NASDAQ: DDOG) CTO sells 43,224 shares, converts Class B stock
feed.summary: Datadog's Chief Technology Officer, Alexis Le-Quoc, sold 43,224 shares of Class A Common Stock on April 22, 2026, under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan, with weighted-average prices between $130.27 and $133.16 per share. Concurrently, he converted 43,224 shares of Class B Common Stock into Class A shares at no cost. Le-Quoc retains substantial holdings, including 6,203,835 Class B shares through a revocable trust.

feed.title: Parker Increases Quarterly Cash Dividend 11% to $2.00 per Share
feed.summary: Parker Hannifin Corporation announced an 11% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $2.00 per share, payable June 5, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 8, 2026. This marks the 304th consecutive quarterly dividend and extends their track record of 70 consecutive years of increasing annual dividend payouts. The increase reflects the board's confidence in the company's consistent cash flow generation and long-term outlook.
